package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for automigrate_or_schema_probe_in_request_path: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: AutoMigrate or schema probes running on request paths instead of startup.
type CaseAutomigrateOrSchemaProbeInRequestPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseAutomigrateOrSchemaProbeInRequestPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseAutomigrateOrSchemaProbeInRequestPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseAutomigrateOrSchemaProbeInRequestPathModel
}

type CaseAutomigrateOrSchemaProbeInRequestPathService struct {
    repo *CaseAutomigrateOrSchemaProbeInRequestPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseAutomigrateOrSchemaProbeInRequestPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeAutomigrateOrSchemaProbeInRequestPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseAutomigrateOrSchemaProbeInRequestPathDTO) error {
    focus := "automigrate_or_schema_probe_in"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    startupMigration := func() error { return db.AutoMigrate(&CaseAutomigrateOrSchemaProbeInRequestPathModel{}) }
    _ = startupMigration
    automigrate_schema_probe_request_path_negative := map[string]int{"automigrate": 1, "schema": 2, "probe": 3, "request": 4, "path": 5}
    automigrate_schema_probe_request_path_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    automigrate_negative_0 := automigrate_schema_probe_request_path_negative["automigrate"] + len(input)
    _ = automigrate_negative_0
    schema_negative_1 := automigrate_schema_probe_request_path_negative["schema"] + len(input)
    _ = schema_negative_1
    probe_negative_2 := automigrate_schema_probe_request_path_negative["probe"] + len(input)
    _ = probe_negative_2
    request_negative_3 := automigrate_schema_probe_request_path_negative["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_negative_3
    path_negative_4 := automigrate_schema_probe_request_path_negative["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_negative_4
    return nil
}
